cards.back: A simple first-order optimization method where the direction of the next step is always in the direction of the gradient
A powerful optimization method that uses the Hessian matrix to find the direction of the next step, which is the negative of the gradient
A first-order optimization method that uses the negative gradient to find the direction of the next step
A variant of gradient descent that uses a mini-batch of data points to compute the gradient, which can be more efficient than full batch gradient descent
A variant of gradient descent that uses a single data point to compute the gradient, which can be more efficient than full batch gradient descent
